items.text:
🎬 CASTING DO FILMU FABULARNEGO

Poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do głównych ról w nowym, poruszającym dramacie wojennym.

📍 Terminy castingu (na żywo):

– Warszawa – 18 kwietnia

– Wrocław – 2 maja

– Gdańsk – 7 maja

🎭 Poszukiwane role:

DZIEWCZYNA (15–20 lat) – rola główna

Wrażliwa, inteligentna, naturalna. Rola wymagająca dużej autentyczności i głębi emocjonalnej.

MATKA (35–45 lat)

Ciepła, silna, oddana rodzinie. Postać pełna emocji i wewnętrznej siły.

OJCIEC (40–50 lat)

Spokojny, odpowiedzialny, obecność sceniczna, subtelna gra emocji.

MŁODSZA SIOSTRA (8–12 lat)

Naturalna, ekspresyjna, emocjonalna relacja z główną bohaterką.

🎥 Doświadczenie mile widziane, ale nie jest wymagane – najważniejsze są naturalność i autentyczność.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

**juliarokietek@gmail.com**

W wiadomości prosimy podać:

– imię i wiek

– miasto zamieszkania

– aktualne zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)

– krótką informację o sobie / doświadczeniu

Wybrane osoby zaprosimy na casting stacjonarny.

Zapraszamy! 🎭

Hi, 

I’m Dominic Heru Jones, London based,

I’m available for background, supporting roles, or any upcoming projects—particularly on weekends. I’m focused on building experience and expanding my credits this year.

Character Types

I think I would fit well

Coach/trainer

Athlete/fighter

Military/disciplined roles (even without real service)

Urban/street roles (based on look & presence)

Open to all opportunities, would love to connect.

items.title: Hi,

items.text:
CASTING CALL ‼️

Looking for talent based in Greater Manchester

Project: Short film
Title: Remember Me?
Location: Farnworth, Bolton, Greater Manchester
Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026

Compensation: £12.71 p/h + food provided on set + travel expenses (via public transport only)
Contract provided

🚨 Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants

Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days.

How to apply:
Please send an email to
RMfilmproduction@outlook.com including your name, headshot and/or showreel and which character you're interested in applying for :)

Deadline for applications is the 10th April and self tapes is the 11th April

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Location: Farnworth Bolton, Greater Manchester Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026 Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days. A few characters who don't appear in the same scene at once could be potentially played by one person. Compensation: £12.71 p/h food provided on set travel expenses (via public transport only) Contract provided Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants'

May be an image of text that says 'About: 'Remember Me?' IS a short 5-6 minute satirical comedy that plays with the illogical tropes and stereotypes found in action films, such as overly exaggerated characters, questionable disguises, and the way they are portrayed on screen. Itisa fast-paced comedy set almost entirely in one flat that begins like a tense, high-stakes thriller but spirals into completely silly chaos. It's a self aware, character driven comedy that to explore gives actors the opportunity meta humor and heightened personalities, all while lightly poking fun at the conventions of the action genre.'
May be an image of text
May be an image of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'Characters The Woman: 6 lines We We all know the "Innocent" character returning home, who is slightly weary from life's everyday struggles. Jaymee is someone who gives off a sense of vulnerability which makes her seem like the typical victim when she's confronted However, just like in some beloved action flicks, the main character turns out to be the mastermind In this case, Jaymee is only really recognized once she removes her wig, revealing she's S several steps ahead of everyone around her.'

I would love to give this ago :)

items.text:
PAID CASTING CALL – LONDON
We are currently looking for London-based actors aged 25+, with a British accent, who present as confident, charismatic and mature on camera.

Project: Podcast-style promotional online video for a website.

Project details:

Filming will take place at the end of April (exact date to be confirmed).

The shoot will last approximately 2 hours.

Fee: £100

Drinks and snacks will be provided on the day.

Location: London

We’re looking for individuals who are comfortable speaking on camera, with a strong presence, natural authority and engaging delivery.

If this sounds like you, please send your Spotlight link, headshot and showreel to georgivelkov98@gmail.com with the subject line: Casting Call.

topComments.text: As a podcast host of an award winning podcast, content creator and professionally trained actress im interested!

items.text:
**Casting** Tuesday 4/7/26 for a feature film called Douen, filming in the DMV area. DOUEN is a Caribbean folklore horror film that explores the legacy of trauma, the power of ancestral healing, and the thin veil between myth and reality. Sania discovers she is being haunted by Douens—spirits of unbaptized dead children—and encounters the protective spirit of the Moko Jumbie. As the story unfolds, these hauntings are revealed to be connected to her family’s dark past in Trinidad.

Characters Needed: 

We are in need of a person that can play a Moko Jumbie (Stilt Walker) on Tuesday 4/7/26. This character requires a performer of exceptional height, specifically a skilled stilt walker capable of appearing towering and slender. Expertise in movement on wooden stilts is a mandatory requirement. (Paid Role) 

Mother/Child Actor (preferable 4-9) but open (Featured, Non-paid role) 

Background Actors (Non-paid Role) 

Email herhousemedia@gmail.com
Name
Contact
Location
Age of child 
Availability

items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SITCOM PILOT (PROOF OF CONCEPT)

We are casting lead and supporting speaking roles for The Rake, a sitcom pilot being developed by BA Filmmaking students at UWE Bristol.

The project will involve filming one key scene as a proof of concept in Bristol on either 27th or 28th April 2026 (1-day shoot). This is a student production, unpaid, with travel expenses and food provided. The scene will form part of a proof of concept for a sitcom in development, to be used for portfolio purposes, festival submission, and as part of a press kit for pitching the project to production companies.

STORY: The Rake is a character-driven comedy set in a once-popular live music venue now struggling to stay afloat, following a music-obsessed supervisor trying to restore it to its former glory, as a new manager pushes it in a completely different direction.

ROLES:

OMAR: Male, 20s, Arab
A music-obsessed supervisor trying to save a failing venue, torn between passion and business.

AISHA: Female, 20s, Arab
Works at The Rake—no one really knows what she does. Omar’s best friend. Chaotic, sarcastic, and secretly invested in the venue.

SEBASTIAN: Male, early 20s, White
Thinks he runs the bar. Loud, arrogant, and desperate for Omar’s approval. Takes Harper on as his “protégé.”

HARPER: Female, 18+, Any ethnicity
New to The Rake. Quiet and nervous at first, but with a sharper edge underneath. Trying to make a good impression while dealing with Sebastian’s ego.

KEY INFO:
Location: Bristol
Shoot date: 27th or 28th April 2026 (1 day)
Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)
Seeking Bristol-based actors

TO APPLY: Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to: therakeseries@gmail.com

f you want to act professionally, learn from someone who is a professional. Check their IMDb—look at the credits, then the REEL. If the FOOTAGE isn’t easy to find, it probably doesn’t exist.

I’ve been training actors for a decade. Do your homework— link to IMDb and reel.  I’m easy to find.

🚨 1 WEEK UNTIL AUDITIONS!! 🚨
*All roles are available* 

We’re looking for passionate actors to bring this story to life! 🤍

If you, or someone you know, might be interested, contact us via emails/DMs, or apply through our link in our bio! 

📍Ferring Village Hall
🎭 No experience needed

Instagram - @triplethreat.theatre 
https://forms.gle/WNgg9KBqoXas2srT9

#castingcalluk #littlewomen #amateurtheatre #worthing #actor #auditions

sharedPost.text: URGENT - LAST MINUTE CASTING!     This is the last of the posts for our Scania job... PLEASE, does anyone out there drive a Scania coach?  Or does anyone know a Scania coach driver??  If you answer yes to either of those, please What's App me asap on 07557220636 (it's for a 1 day shoot, paying €2,300 on April 10th!).   #coach #coachdrivers #scania

Casting Call — Male Actors (LA, April 6)
Hey! We’re casting for a bold, emotional, and slightly dark-funny video campaign in Los Angeles

Looking for:

**2 Male actor (28–40)**
Good-looking, confident, and naturally funny
Not afraid to look stupid / go all in
Comfortable with physical comedy (yes - including things like an ice bath 😅)

We’re shooting a series of cinematic ads for an immersive experience called

Location: DTLA
Shoot: THIS MONDAY (4-5 hours)
Paid -  150-200 Dollars 

DM IF YOU ARE INTERESTED - SEND ME YOUR SHOWREEL

items.text:
⛵ A YACHT-ROCKIN' 👀EYE-POPPIN' 🎵🎸SIGHT & SOUND SPECTACULAR!✨

ROCK THE BOAT: The band that reinvented Yacht Rock!  It’s not just a concert… it’s a MUSIC/CINEMATIC EXPERIENCE where LIVE MUSIC and MOVIES collide into a vivid, multi-sensory journey!

Created by former Disney Cast Members, ROCK THE BOAT brings Yacht Rock to life with ALL-ORIGINAL MOVIES on a big screen synchronized to every song. As the awesome live band plays and sings, the lyrics' stories unfold, visually immersing you right into the music.  You've never seen a show like this before!  It's an exciting audio/visual multimedia adventure filled with ear candy and eye candy!

🎶 Smooth Yacht Rock Hits from:

The Doobie Brothers • Steely Dan • Toto • Boz Scaggs • Christopher Cross • Jimmy Buffett • Kenny Loggins • Michael McDonald and more with dazzling cinematic storytelling.

✨ 6-piece all-pro band

🎤 4 powerhouse lead singers and melodious harmonies 

🎥 Big movie screen with all-original films by a former Disney VFX artist

You don’t just hear the songs… you SEE them.

🎬 It’s a CONCERT

🎬 It’s MOVIE NIGHT 

🎬 It’s *BOTH*

👇 Watch the video:  www.RockTheBoat.band/see-hear-now

📣 VENUES & BOOKERS:

Limited 2026 dates available — Are you ready to make a BIG SPLASH with a one-of-a-kind show?

(Projection & screen included where needed)

👉 www.RockTheBoat.band

Contact:  gary@RockTheBoat.band  818-748-7630

https://fb.watch/GheT6-tgRI/

items.text:
Ihre Hochzeit – Einzigartig. Elegant. Unvergesslich. ✨

Sie suchen das Besondere für Ihren großen Tag? Jemanden, der Professionalität mit echter Leidenschaft verbindet?

Egal ob Sie eine emotionale Begleitung durch eine Sängerin, einen souveränen Master of Ceremony oder einen mitreißenden Special Act suchen – ich biete Ihnen themenbezogene Eleganz und ein Programm mit Herz.

Warum ich der richtige Partner an Ihrer Seite bin?

Weil ich Ihre Feier aus jeder Perspektive verstehe. Seit über 30 Jahren bin ich als gelernter Eventmanager, Gastronom und Künstler auf kleinen und großen Festen zu Hause. Diese einzigartige Kombination garantiert Ihnen Kompetenz, Empathie und einen unvergesslichen Ablauf.

✉️ Bereit für ein Fest der Extraklasse? 

Kontaktieren Sie mich jetzt für einen Termin zum kostenloses Vorgespräch! Ich freue mich auf Ihre Nachricht.

📧 office-leipzig@web.de
☎️ 034202 154910

#hochzeitssängerin #masterofceremony #hochzeit2026 #eventprofi #specialact #mathiasmariekaiser

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of suit and wedding

items.text:
Looking for strong, intentional performers for a cinematic short film SoCal area
I’m casting:

— THE MYSTERY MAN (Antagonist)

— THE CAPTURED MAN (Lead)

— HENCHMEN (2)

This is a performance-driven project focused on presence, tension, and visual storytelling. Looking for actors who can bring depth, control, and authenticity to the screen.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPzBPEl-aXySCqn5cB0yRcU0VB1GO85LhcBho1bD6HYHOrKw/viewform

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL THE CAPTURED MAN Role Type: Lead Age Range: 25 30 Ethnicity: Black Character Descrip Description A man thrown into violent situation he doesn't belong in. When we meet him, he is bruised, bloodied, and terrified pleading for his life. Requirements Strong emotional range (fear, panic, confusion, determination) Ability to carry intense, dialogue- heavy scenes Expressive facial reactions and physical storytelling Must convincingly portray exhaustion, injury, and sur vival Physical/Styl Requirement Must be comfortable wearing bloody makeup and prosthetics Submission Requirements: Headshot+ recent photos Height and basic stats Acting or clips available) Contact information'

May be a graphic of text that says 'Directed by Jayda Chippie Carcamo SHORT FILM CASTING CALL THEMYSTERYMAN Role BoleType:Antagonist/Authorityilgur ype:Antagonist Authority Figure Age Range: 25-30 Ethnicity: Black ကမ်မ CharacterDescription: Calm, controlled, and deeply unsettling. Performance requirements: Strong, commanding presence minimal movement Ability to convey through stillness subtle expression Controlled, grounded vocalo vocal delivery West demeanor or accent Has Physical/StylslicRequirement Must be willing to wear bottom grill or visible top tooth detail Headshot+ recent photos Height and basic stats Acting reel clips available) Contacti information INNPYROTE 2000332'

May be an image of text that says 'Foran Upcomingproduction by Jayda Chippie Carcamo Casting Call Looking for 2 Males -Must be the same exact height twins individuals of identical height/build height/ Strong physical awareness and ability to perform slow, precise movements Comfortable performing full costume black wardrobe, ski masks) Silent, and controlled Move with purpose minimal but impactful -Almost mechanical ori sync with one another •Filming will require coordination timing between both performers dialogue; performance entirely physical ·Height must Hoight/mustmatch.arhtrrpn match partner applying as pair) ·Recentphotos -Recent photos Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com'

**Appearance:** Black / African / Mixed-race / Afro-Caribbean

**Language:** English (the series will be filmed in English)

**To apply:**
Please send your **CV and introduction (in English)** to:
📩 [shevchuk.el@gmail.com](mailto:shevchuk.el@gmail.com)

We look forward to your submissions!
items.title: CASTING CALL – DAY ROLE

items.text:
CASTING CALL ‼️

Looking for talent based in Greater Manchester

Project: Short film
Title: Remember Me?
Location: Farnworth, Bolton, Greater Manchester
Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026

Compensation: £12.71 p/h + food provided on set + travel expenses (via public transport only)
Contract provided

🚨 Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants

Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days.

How to apply:
Please send an email to
RMfilmproduction@outlook.com including your name, headshot and/or showreel and which character you're interested in applying for :)

Deadline for applications is the 10th April and self tapes is the 11th April

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Location: Farnworth, Bolton, Greater Manchester Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026 Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days. A few characters who don't appear in the same scene at once could be potentially played by one person. Compensation: £12.71 p/h food provided on set travel expenses (via public transport only) Contract provided Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants'

May be an image of text that says 'About: 'Remember Me?' is a short 5-6 minute satirical comedy that plays with the illogical tropes and stereotypes found in action films, such as overly exaggerated characters, questionable disguises, and the way they are portrayeo on screen. Itisa fast-paced comedy set almost entirely in one flat that begins like a tense, high-stakes thriller but spirals into completely silly chaos. It's a self aware, character driven comedy that gives actors the opportunity to explore meta humor and heightened personalities, all while lightly poking fun at the of the action genre. conventions'
May be an image of text
May be an image of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'Characters The Woman: 6 lines We We all know the "Innocent" character returning home, who is slightly weary from life's everyday struggles. Jaymee is someone who gives off a sense of vulnerability which makes her seem like the typical victim when she's confronted However, just like in some beloved action flicks, the main character turns out to be the mastermind In this case, Jaymee is only really recognized once she removes her wig, revealing she's S several steps ahead of everyone around her.'

Hello, my name is Molly I’m a 19 year old performer currently training at Italia Conti on the foundation Musical theatre course! 

I have found through my year of my training that I have a real passion for acting and am seeking to gain more experience in this field.

If anyone is looking to cast short films, student films, advertisements etc I’d be happy to provide a self tapes!

I’m based in Buckinghamshire but happy to travel within reason.

sharedPost.text:
Stimmtraining für Tanzlehrende mit Stefanie Rummel
Mitreißender 3-stündiger interaktiver Vortrag, der stimmlich viel bewegt hat! 🎤💃
Vielen Dank für die tolle Weiterempfehlung! 🤍 @gassnertorsten

Der Talk „Stimmliche Stärke & Stimmgesundheit für Tanzlehrende“ war ein voller Erfolg! 🔥
Wir haben maßgeschneiderte Lösungen erarbeitet, geübt, entdeckt und herzlich gelacht. Am Ende: Standing Ovations! 🙌
Ein inspirierender Tag, der mich und viele bewegt hat.
Stimme geben ist essenziell! 💃🗣️
Danke INTAKO Kongress für Tanz in Düsseldorf! ✨

translate the last post into English

**Voice Training for Dance Teachers with Stefanie Rummel**  
Thrilling 3-hour interactive lecture that really moved voices! 🎤💃  

Thank you so much for the great recommendation! 🤍 @gassnertorsten  

The talk "Vocal Strength & Voice Health for Dance Teachers" was a huge success! 🔥  

We developed tailored solutions, practiced, discovered, and laughed heartily. In the end: Standing ovations! 🙌  
An inspiring day that moved me and many others.  

Giving voice is essential! 💃🗣️  
Thanks @IntakoDüsseldorf – Dance Congress! ✨

www.sing-teach.com
www.institut-rummel.de

items.text: Come join our Musical Theatre Master Class with David Burnham!

sharedPost.text:
There's only 1 participant spot left for our next Wisdom of the Masters Master Class with David Burnham! The class is a week from today on Monday April 6th at 7:00pm!

This is a wonderful opportunity for participants to work with and get feedback from an industry professional.

There are also observer spots available! Observers will not only have the invaluable and rare opportunity to "learn by watching", but the evening will also include a Q&A for all in attendance. 

Get tickets at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

items.text: *Chicago, Illinois*

sharedPost.text:
CREW CALL: PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS – FASHION SHOW VENDOR OPPORTUNITY

#MAGEMotionPictures is seeking reliable and detail-oriented Production Assistants for an upcoming fashion show vendor opportunity.  Actors/Actresses are encouraged to apply.  

Date: Sunday, April 19th  
Time: 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM  
(May end sooner; full day rate will still be honored)

Location:  
Details will be provided upon signing of contract

Wardrobe / Dress Code:  
Business Casual Required
- Women: Combination colors of red, pink, and/or purple
- Men: All black with red, pink, or purple accent colors
- Overall appearance should remain clean, polished, and professional

Responsibilities May Include:
- Assisting with vendor setup and breakdown  
- Supporting backstage operations and coordination  
- Managing product flow and display areas  
- Providing general on-site production support  

Ideal Candidates:
- Punctual, professional, and proactive  
- Able to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment  
- Strong communication and organizational skills  
- Prior event or production experience is a plus (but not required)

Compensation:  
Paid – Full day rate guaranteed

To Apply / Inquire:  
Email K. Dixon at kdmagestudio@gmail.com TODAY with your name, contact information, and any relevant experience.

Serious inquiries only. Let’s execute excellence.

items.text:
CASTING OPEN — THE ASK (RTN Raleigh)

We’re looking for real people with powerful, unforgettable life stories.

Not perfect stories.
Not polished ones.
Real ones.

If you’ve been through something that changed you —
this is your moment to be heard.

🎥 The Ask is a TV project airing on RTN (Raleigh Television Network).

📍 Filming takes place in Raleigh, North Carolina
📩 Send your story to: theaskoffice@gmail.com

Tell us who you are.

items.text:
i’ve been told several times by different parents that my rambunctious son should try child modeling. i have no idea if their feedback is real, or if they just say that to every kid just to be nice, but here are some pictures. 😅 

he’s five. we are based in los angeles. i have no what the standard is for casting directors but i guess i’ll find out here.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of child and text
May be an image of baby and sleepwear
May be an image of child

topComments.text: Self submit to agencies using clear clean snapshots if they are interested they reach out for a meeting. Try Zuri they are the best for kids print in LA. Simple solid color shirts work, no logos or characters.
Join BOOKED & BUSY KIDS for industry advice from parents with kids in the industry. He’s cute but you would not submit any of these photos. I have two who’s been in the business 7 yrs.

sharedPost.text:
Thank you, Bella Bebe, for giving Gia the opportunity to walk in your beautiful clothing line. You are such a talented designer, and she truly enjoyed the experience and loved every moment of it.

Thank you, Brooke, as well, for having Gia walk in your amazing fashion show. We really appreciate the opportunity—it was a wonderful experience.#modeling #fashionblogger  #model  #bellabebe

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – BL Vertical Drama (Paid Project)（just Asian faces）
(한국 、日本 ประเทศไทย people）

We are casting for a vertical short drama (BL genre).

📍 Shooting Location: China / Thailand  

📅 Shooting Duration: 7 days  

🎭 Role: Male Lead (BL)

Requirements:

- Male, visual age 17—25

- Tall, handsome, strong facial features (good on camera)  

- Korean / Japanese / Thai (based in Thailand preferred)  

- Basic Chinese is a plus  

- Acting experience not required, but must have good on-screen presence  

- Able to perform romantic chemistry (including kissing scenes)  

- Natural masculine vibe (not overly feminine)  

- Not signed / or open to signing preferred  

💰 Budget: 2000–2500 RMB (full project)

We welcome newcomers / influencers / models.

📩 Contact:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— THAI ———

🎬 เปิดรับนักแสดง – ซีรีส์วาย (แนวตั้ง) มีค่าตอบแทน

📍 สถานที่ถ่ายทำ: จีน / ไทย 

📅 ระยะเวลาถ่ายทำ: 7 วัน  

🎭 บท: นักแสดงนำชาย  

คุณสมบัติ:

- ผู้ชาย อายุภาพลักษณ์ 17—25ปี  

- สูง หน้าตาดี โครงหน้าชัด กล้องขึ้น  

- คนไทย / เกาหลี / ญี่ปุ่น (ที่อยู่ในไทยจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)  

- พูดภาษาจีนเบื้องต้นได้จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ  

- ไม่จำเป็นต้องมีประสบการณ์ แต่ต้องมีเสน่ห์หน้ากล้อง  

- สามารถเล่นฉากโรแมนติกและฉากจูบได้  

- บุคลิกแมน เป็นธรรมชาติ  

- ยังไม่สังกัดค่าย หรือพร้อมเซ็นสัญญา  

💰 ค่าตอบแทน: 2000–2500 RMB  

📩 ติดต่อ:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— KOREAN ———

🎬 캐스팅 공고 – BL 세로형 드라마 (유료 프로젝트)

📍 촬영 장소: 중국 / 태국  

📅 촬영 기간: 7일  

🎭 역할: 남자 주연  

지원 조건:

- 남성, 비주얼 나이 17—25세  

- 키 크고 잘생긴 외모, 또렷한 이목구비  

- 태국 거주 한국인 / 일본인 / 태국인 우대  

- 간단한 중국어 가능자 우대  

- 연기 경험 없어도 지원 가능 (카메라 존재감 중요)  

- 키스신 및 로맨스 연기 가능자  

- 자연스럽고 남성적인 이미지  

- 미계약자 또는 계약 가능자  

💰 출연료: 2000~2500 RMB  

📩 연락처:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— JAPANESE ———

🎬 キャスティング募集 – BL縦型ドラマ（有料案件）

📍 撮影場所: 中国 / タイ  

📅 撮影期間: 7日間  

🎭 役: 男性主演 

応募条件:

- 男性、見た目年齢17—25歳  

- 高身長、整った顔立ち、カメラ映えする方  

- タイ在住の日本人 / 韓国人 / タイ人優先  

- 簡単な中国語ができる方歓迎  

- 演技経験不問（存在感重視）  

- キスシーン可能な方  

- 自然で男性的な雰囲気  

- 未所属、または契約可能な方  

💰 ギャラ: 2000〜2500 RMB  

📩 連絡先:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

Just Asian faces.

🎭 역할: 남자 주연  

지원 조건:

- 남성, 비주얼 나이 17—25세  

- 키 크고 잘생긴 외모, 또렷한 이목구비  

- 태국 거주 한국인 / 일본인 / 태국인 우대  

- 간단한 중국어 가능자 우대  

- 연기 경험 없어도 지원 가능 (카메라 존재감 중요)  

- 키스신 및 로맨스 연기 가능자  

- 자연스럽고 남성적인 이미지  

- 미계약자 또는 계약 가능자  

💰 출연료: 2000~2500 RMB  

📩 연락처:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— JAPANESE ———

🎬 キャスティング募集 – BL縦型ドラマ（有料案件）

📍 撮影場所: 中国 / タイ  

📅 撮影期間: 7日間  

🎭 役: 男性主演 

応募条件:

- 男性、見た目年齢17—25歳  

- 高身長、整った顔立ち、カメラ映えする方  

- タイ在住の日本人 / 韓国人 / タイ人優先  

- 簡単な中国語ができる方歓迎  

- 演技経験不問（存在感重視）  

- キスシーン可能な方  

- 自然で男性的な雰囲気  

- 未所属、または契約可能な方  

💰 ギャラ: 2000〜2500 RMB  

📩 連絡先:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

Just Asian faces.

items.text:
🎤 ⭐️ 𝐔𝐰𝐚𝐠𝐚! 𝐎𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐧𝐢 𝐭𝐲𝐝𝐳𝐢𝐞𝐧́ 𝐳𝐠ł𝐨𝐬𝐳𝐞𝐧́ 𝐝𝐨 𝐎𝐠𝐨́𝐥𝐧𝐨𝐩𝐨𝐥𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐞𝐠𝐨 𝐊𝐨𝐧𝐤𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐮 𝐖𝐨𝐤𝐚𝐥𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨! 🥰

🎤 Złap oddech. Daj się ponieść głosowi.

⭐️ Zapraszamy solistów, duety i zespoły z całej Polski do udziału w wyjątkowym konkursie wokalnym, w którym pracujemy nad tym, co w śpiewie najważniejsze — świadomym oddechem i swobodnym prowadzeniem dźwięku.

Pokaż, jak Twój głos potrafi brzmieć, gdy daje mu się przestrzeń.
Nie liczy się wiek — liczy się pasja i chęć rozwoju.
Dołącz do nas i pozwól swojemu głosowi naprawdę wybrzmieć.
Zgłoszenia trwają już tylko 7 dni!

🏅 Na każdego uczestnika czeka dyplom, webinar oraz e-book na temat oddechu, a na laureatów I, II i III miejsca statuetki! ️

link do regulaminu: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin)

link do karty zgłoszenia: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ZGŁOSZENIA DO:: LABORATORIUM DŻWIĘKÓW ZAPRASZA NA: OGÓLNOPOLSKI COLNOPOLSKLK KONKURS WOKALNY ODDECH KTÓRY NIESIE 03 KWIETNIA OSTATNI TYDZIEŃ ZGŁOSZEN Bo KAŻDY GŁOS ZACZYNA SIĘ OD ODDECHU.'

*BOOKS OPEN*

Hope everyone has a Brilliant Easter 💛

Our books are open for those ages 6-15 years and 45+ for performers interested in Film & TV, Stage & Musicals, Modeling & Commercials based anywhere in the UK & Ireland. And also Americans of all ages based in London for a specific project currently casting. 

We will be reviewing applications over the Easter Holiday. 

Parents must apply on behalf of their child.

The Application Form can be found here - https://aurumtalentagency.com/RepresentationForm

Thank you ✨

items.text:
*“Acting Up!” – Valley Theatre’s Free guided acting program for Adults -  next sessions*
A big thanks for the great turn out for our Improv evening last Monday. We’re having a week off for bank holiday but then back on Monday April 13th for our new topic: *Monologues* . Fun to do and great for auditions! 
As per the Ethos of the course, participants will be guided towards a performance  - this time a short - or shortish - scripted monologue for our  *Monologue-athon!* later in the month.
All welcome. *Ps writers!* Have you a short monologue you’d like to submit for our students’ consideration and for our upcoming scratch night?  Submission on Word to info@valleytheatre.co.uk with *“Monologues”* in the subject box.
- The Valley team

items.text:
CASTING CALL ‼️

Looking for talent based in Greater Manchester

Project: Short film
Title: Remember Me?
Location: Farnworth, Bolton, Greater Manchester
Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026

Compensation: £12.71 p/h + food provided on set + travel expenses (via public transport only)
Contract provided

🚨 Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants

Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days.

How to apply:
Please send an email to
RMfilmproduction@outlook.com including your name, headshot and/or showreel and which character you're interested in applying for :)

Deadline for applications is the 10th April and self tapes is the 11th April

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Location: Farnworth Bolton, Greater Manchester Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026 Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days. A few characters who don't appear in the same scene at once could be potentially played by one person. Compensation: £12.71 p/h food provided on set travel expenses (via public transport only) Contract provided Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants'

May be an image of text that says 'About: 'Remember Me?' is a short 5-6 minute satirical comedy that plays with the illogical tropes and stereotypes found in action films, such as overly exaggerated characters, questionable disguises, and the way they are portrayeo on screen. Itisa fast-paced comedy set almost entirely in one flat that begins like a tense, high-stakes thriller but spirals into completely silly chaos. It's a self aware, character driven comedy that gives actors the opportunity to explore meta humor and heightened personalities, all while lightly poking fun at the of the action genre. conventions'
May be an image of text
May be an image of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'Characters The Woman: 6 lines Weall We all know the "Innocent" character returning home, who is slightly weary from life's everyday struggles. Jaymee is someone who gives off a sense of vulnerability which makes her seem like the typical victim when she's confronted However, just like n some beloved action flicks, the main character turns out to be the mastermind In this case, Jaymee S only really recognized once she removes her wig, revealing she's S several steps ahead of everyone around her.'

items.text:
🚨 URGENT CASTING CALL – Turmoil Devotion 🚨

We are urgently looking for an actor to join our upcoming short film Turmoil Devotion, shooting this Tuesday.

🎭 Role: Mary (Teacher)

 • Age: 18:30

 • Gender: Female 

 • Brief description:

A supporting ballet teacher who has spent years helping Belle battle with anxiety and  hopes the best for her future 

📍 Location: Brighton Youth Centre

📅 Shoot Date: Tuesday 7th April 2026

This is a student production that has recently been greenlit, and we’re now moving quickly into the final stage of production.

We’re looking for someone who is:

 • Reliable and available on the shoot date

 • Comfortable working in a collaborative, creative environment

 • Able to bring strong character presence to the role

✨ This is a great opportunity to be part of a passionate and dedicated team bringing an exciting project to life.

If you’re interested or would like more details, please DM me as soon as possible.

Get in touch Eric: 1233149@sfsstudents.ac.uk Or via QR Code Shooting Dates 中 Tuesday 7th Anril 2026 O . BERICI 1020721'

Hi everyone,

I’m currently casting for an upcoming short film and looking for actors who fit the character descriptions (see attached images for full details).

This is a passion project, and I’m looking to collaborate with dedicated actors who are passionate about storytelling and want to be part of a strong creative piece.

PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF:
• You fit the character description
• You are available for the full shoot day(s) on the specified dates
• You are committed, reliable, and serious about the project

If you’re interested, send me a message and I’ll provide self-tape instructions.

Looking forward to connecting and seeing your work!

— Angelo

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)

Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:
• Approaching people
• Asking fun / engaging questions
• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:
• 2–3 hour shoot
• £80–£100 paid
• London location

Ideal for:
• Drama students
• Aspiring presenters
• Content creators

Must have:
• Strong energy
• Natural speaking style
• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:
Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

topComments.text: Hi what sort of interview is this? Could I have more information

items.summary:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)

Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:
• Approaching people
• Asking fun / engaging questions
• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:
• 2–3 hour shoot
• £80–£100 paid
• London location

Ideal for:
• Drama students
• Aspiring presenters
• Content creators

Must have:
• Strong energy
• Natural speaking style
• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:
Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.
items.title: 🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)

items.text:
PAID SHOOT | ARM DOUBLE NEEDED | Los Angeles, CA

Looking for a hand/arm double for a fun, quirky concept — multiple arms appear in frame simultaneously as a visual gag.

Rate: $300 / 2 hours + wardrobe fitting

We're matching these measurements (or trying to get as close to it as possible):

Bicep: 9½"
Forearm: 7¼"
Full arm length: 22¾"

We'll be filming hands and forearms on a desk — no face on camera. Wardrobe is a button-down shirt with sleeves visible. Continuity of arm size and skin tone with our lead is essential, so close measurement match is a must.

📅 Wardrobe Fitting: April 8th — Los Angeles, CA 📅 Shoot Day: April 10th — Los Angeles, CA ✅ 

To apply: Comment or DM with your email + photos of your hands/arms alongside your measurements. Please include bicep, forearm, and full arm length.

items.text:
Ищем артистов на сезон в Турции (г. Кушадасы 🇹🇷)

В нашу команду требуются:
✨ 3 танцовщицы
✨ 1 цирковая артистка с партерными номерами

📅 Период работы: с мая по середину октября

🎭 Формат работы:
• Детские шоу
• Кабаре шоу

⸻

Мы предоставляем:
✔ Проживание
✔ Питание
✔ Рабочую визу
✔ Костюмы
✔ Авиабилеты в обе стороны
✔ Трансфер на работу

⸻

Если вы заинтересованы — присылайте:
📩 резюме
📸 фото
🎥 видео материалы

📲 WhatsApp / Telegram: +90 545 556 65 50

items.text:
Coucou tout le monde ☀️ 
Lors du grand week-end festif du 23 au 25 mai, l’association Âme Dambé et Binkiss Sangaré organisent aussi un STAGE de PERCUSSIONS avec le grand MAESTRO HAROUNA DEMBELE 🤩😍🥳 qui nous fera l'honneur d'être parmis nous: 

Le SAMEDI: 
CMA LES LICES
15H30 à 17h30

DIMANCHE:
SALLE ZIN’ART
13h30 à 15h30

1 stage 40€
2 stages 70€

5€ d'adhésion obligatoire 

L'inscription est confirmée à réception des arrhes qui correspondent à la moitié du montant 🙏

🙏 Les arrhes ne sont pas remboursables si annulation de votre part 🙏

Les PLACES sont LIMITÉES 🙏☀️

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour toute information complémentaire.

INSCRIPTIONS :

ame.dambe.asso@gmail.com
06 74 99 96 34 (via whatsapp)
06 69 00 18 64

items.text:
🎬 Kreative in Dortmund/Bochum gesucht!
Hey zusammen,

ich baue aktuell ein kleines, Content-Team Schauspieler*innen im Raum Dortmund/Bochum auf. Ziel ist es, wöchentlich cinematischen, hochwertigen Content zu produzieren und uns langfristig gemeinsam weiterzuentwickeln.

Ich bin aufstrebender Schauspieler und habe bereits konkrete Ideen sowie eine klare Vision für den Content (cinematisch, relatable, im Filmstil).

Wenn du Leidenschaft für Content Creation hast und Teil von etwas Konsequentem und Ernsthaftem sein möchtest, melde dich gerne bei mir!

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

The Six Compound4061 

Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

I need several actors to play me as a 10 year old, my mom and Dad as early twenties, me again at age 30 something and maybe some extras. This is going to be a big project. Please message me if interested or if you know of anyone who could do it. Thank you!

Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SITCOM PILOT (PROOF OF CONCEPT)

We are casting lead and supporting speaking roles for The Rake, a sitcom pilot being developed by BA Filmmaking students at UWE Bristol.

The project will involve filming one key scene as a proof of concept in Bristol on either 27th or 28th April 2026 (1-day shoot). This is a student production, unpaid, with travel expenses and food provided. The scene will form part of a proof of concept for a sitcom in development, to be used for portfolio purposes, festival submission, and as part of a press kit for pitching the project to production companies.

STORY: The Rake is a character-driven comedy set in a once-popular live music venue now struggling to stay afloat, following a music-obsessed supervisor trying to restore it to its former glory, as a new manager pushes it in a completely different direction.

ROLES:

OMAR: Male, 20s, Arab
A music-obsessed supervisor trying to save a failing venue, torn between passion and business.

AISHA: Female, 20s, Arab
Works at The Rake—no one really knows what she does. Omar’s best friend. Chaotic, sarcastic, and secretly invested in the venue.

SEBASTIAN: Male, early 20s, White
Thinks he runs the bar. Loud, arrogant, and desperate for Omar’s approval. Takes Harper on as his “protégé.”

HARPER: Female, 18+, Any ethnicity
New to The Rake. Quiet and nervous at first, but with a sharper edge underneath. Trying to make a good impression while dealing with Sebastian’s ego.

KEY INFO:
Location: Bristol
Shoot date: 27th or 28th April 2026 (1 day)
Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)
Seeking Bristol-based actors

TO APPLY: Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to: therakeseries@gmail.com

COT, SARCASTIC, AND SECRETLY INVESTED THE VENUE. SEBASTIAN (21, WHITE, MALE) SUPPORTING THINKS RUNS BAR LOUD, ARROGANT, AND OMAR'S APPROVAL TAKES HARPER ON AS HIS "PROTÉGÉ." HARPER (18, TO SHARPER ANY RACE, FEMALE) SUPPORTING NERVOUS WHILE DEALING WITH WITH SCENE AS PART SEBASTIAN' FILMING BRISTOL, ACTORS (VOLUNTARY). TRAVEL PILOT SEEKING PROVIDED. HEADSHOTS THERAKESERIES@GMAIL.COM'

🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.  

#ForeverEntertainment #CrowdfundDreams #LightsCameraAction #AmericanProduction #CollaborateAndCreate 
#BeTheChange 
#ShineTogether 
#FilmCommunity 
#SupportTheArts 
#YourNameInLights

items.text:
(PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

An upcoming independent student short film casting for the lead role of Catwoman!! Using a special loan granted and sponsored by our film school.

Producer/Director: Maddi Egan (unfortunately our previous director has had to step away due to family commitments)

Role: Catwoman

Gender: Female

Age Range: 18–25

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STAGED READING (THEATRE)**

**TITLE:** The Stress Fracture

**LOCATION:** Duns, Scotland

**PRODUCTION DATE:** May 4–5, 2026

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid (£150 per day)

**PRODUCER OR PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Tatty Pants Theatre Co.

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q)) for casting details.

Tatty Pants Theatre Co. is casting performers for **“The Stress Fracture”** by Ben Ramsay, a new play heading to **DunsPlayFest** as part of their Play Development Series.

**ROLES**

**RACHEL ZIELINSKI**

Female | Mid 20s

• Trade union representative

• Intelligent, grounded, and strong-willed

**YVONNE WISHART**

Female | 40s

• Retail manager

• Disciplinary investigator

• Authoritative with underlying complexity

**Production Details**

• Rehearsals:

– May 4 (12pm–8pm)

– May 5 (10am–late)

• Staged Reading:

– May 5 at 9:15PM

• Location: Volunteer Hall, Duns

• Open to **Scotland-based actors**

• All experience levels encouraged

**CASTING CALL – STAGED READING (THEATRE)**

**TITLE:** The Stress Fracture

**LOCATION:** Duns, Scotland

**PRODUCTION DATE:** May 4–5, 2026

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid (£150 per day)

**PRODUCER OR PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Tatty Pants Theatre Co.

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q)) for casting details.

Tatty Pants Theatre Co. is casting performers for **“The Stress Fracture”** by Ben Ramsay, a new play heading to **DunsPlayFest** as part of their Play Development Series.

**ROLES**

**RACHEL ZIELINSKI**

Female | Mid 20s

• Trade union representative

• Intelligent, grounded, and strong-willed

**YVONNE WISHART**

Female | 40s

• Retail manager

• Disciplinary investigator

• Authoritative with underlying complexity

**Production Details**

• Rehearsals:

– May 4 (12pm–8pm)

– May 5 (10am–late)

• Staged Reading:

– May 5 at 9:15PM

• Location: Volunteer Hall, Duns

• Open to **Scotland-based actors**

• All experience levels encouraged

**HOW TO APPLY**

Apply via **Actors & Extras** as a Talent PRO member with a **1-month FREE trial**:

[[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7epADAosI8qvu4HY8uj-DkgNfND5M9LaI-3wvWZfv1gATB9Aj68swCLacPNA_aem_HL8FJEETtK6GFQZQSHrjgA&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw))

En kreativ og lækker opskrift lavet udelukkende med kartofler og simple ingredienser
Ingredienser
Kartofler: 6 mellemstore, skåret i kvarte og sat på spyd
Hvidløg: 1-2 fed, presset
Olivenolie: 2 spsk
Salt: Efter smag
Rasp: 100 g (1/2 kop)
Paprika: 1 tsk
Sort peber: 1/2 tsk
Cheddarost: 50 g (1,7 oz), revet
Jeg må lige sige noget for at få mine opskrifter til at fortsætte... Tak.

items.text:
Casting Call For Student Short Film
Hey! My name is Quentin Diaz, and I’m a high-school student filmmaker at Denver School of the Arts. I’m casting a 5-minute drama short!

**Title**: Silver Moon

**Genre**: Drama

**Logline**: An aging darkroom enthusiast reconnects with his distant daughter, finally confronting their deteriorating relationship.

**Role**: The daughter, Martha. Mid-30s

**Compensation**: *No Compensation besides meals*

**Shooting** **Dates**: April 18 & April 19

**Location**: Denver, CO

Contact me if you’re interested!

Quentin Diaz

items.summary:
Casting Call For Student Short Film
Hey! My name is Quentin Diaz, and I’m a high-school student filmmaker at Denver School of the Arts. I’m casting a 5-minute drama short!

**Title**: Silver Moon

**Genre**: Drama

**Logline**: An aging darkroom enthusiast reconnects with his distant daughter, finally confronting their deteriorating relationship.

**Role**: The daughter, Martha. Mid-30s

**Compensation**: *No Compensation besides meals*

**Shooting** **Dates**: April 18 & April 19

**Location**: Denver, CO

Contact me if you’re interested!

Quentin Diaz

[801896@dpsk12.net](mailto:801896@dpsk12.net)

items.text:
Casting Call - A Curated Exit (Theatre, paid, non-union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions

**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White

**Director:**

Richard White

**Union Status**

Non-Union

**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance

**Compensation Details**

Profit Share

**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)

**Submission Deadline**

April 8th, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.

**Submission Instructions**

Please contact Kristywoollam@gmail.com to receive sides for a self tape.

Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to Kristywoollam@gmail.com.

**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.

**Casting for:**

STEVE Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

items.text:
Open Call: A Visual Letter To Your Animal
Hi everyone,

I’m hosting a community screening of Paws Land (毛家) at The Cinematheque in Vancouver on May 23, and adding a showcase before the film.

We’re inviting 20-second video pieces for a segment called "A Visual Letter to Your Animal”

If you could say something to your animal, what would it be?
Not looking for polished productions or heavy editing. 

Just something sincere, intentional, or creative.

Selected works will be screened in the cinema before Paws Land 

Submission details:
- 20 seconds
- Landscape
- 1920 × 1080
- MP4 or MOV
- Deadline: April 26, 2026

If you have something that fits, or want to create something small for this, we would love to see it.

More details + submission: https://wcculturallab.ca/?p=698

Presented by West Coast Cultural Lab | Media Partner: Vancouver On Ink

🐣🌸 Frohe Ostern von den FMM Studios München! 🌸🐣  

Wir wünschen all unseren Kunden – und allen, die es noch werden möchten – entspannte Feiertage, kreative Inspiration und ganz viel gute Musik! 🎶✨  

Die FMM Studios München stehen für professionelle:  
🎧 Musikproduktion  
🎚️ Mixing & Mastering  
🎬 Postproduktion (Film & Audio)  

Und für alle, die selbst durchstarten wollen:  
🎹 Coaching & Kurse – online oder 1:1 direkt bei uns im Studio  

Egal ob du deinen nächsten Song produzieren willst, deinen Mix auf ein neues Level bringen möchtest oder in die Welt der Audioproduktion eintauchen willst – wir sind für dich da.  

👉 Mehr Infos: www.fmm-studios.de  

Genießt die Feiertage und bleibt kreativ! 🐰🎶  
Euer FMM Studios Team

sharedPost.text:
---

🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype

"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name

🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

---

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.

---

🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach)

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill

📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):

1. Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."

2. The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"

3. Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.

4. Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.

5. Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call

📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

---

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable

🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point

📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision.

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

---

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew

🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.

Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)

🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

---

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape

📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:

1. Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.

2. Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.

3. Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:

1. Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

2. Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.

3. Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux

📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

---

Final Performance (Day 4):

Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

---

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?

This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:

mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com

Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
Seattle WA
FlightTime Productions proudly presents auditions for the upcoming Short Film:

                     Amelia, Once More

We are seeking cast members of all kinds: adult men, women and children. Must be 16+ to audition for the production. 

Non-Union Actors Only!

Auditions are by appointment only:

Friday, April 3rd, 2026

12PM, 1PM, 2PM, 3PM & 4PM

To sign up for a free audition appointment, please email an updated copy of your headshot and acting resume to ameliastageplay@gmail.com. Please also list two available audition times you are available to audition at.

Auditions will be held at:

Seattle Public Library- Ballard Branch

5614 22nd Ave. N.W. 

Seattle, WA 98107

*This event is NOT hosted, sponsored, or endorsed by The Seattle Public Library*

For auditions, please prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice. Preferably a comedic or dramatic monologue that can show your talent range. Please note, improvisation skills are definitely important for the production. You will also be acting out parts from the short film with other actors for the audition process.

If cast, there will be rehearsal schedule meeting to discuss availability as well as the show schedule. A stipend will be paid out to all actors involved in the film.

Filming will begin in July 2026 for a 3-6 week timeframe.

Mellem to øjeblikke (Kortfilm)SKUESPILLERE ELLER KAMAREMAND SØGES TIL KORTFILM I VEJLE 🎬

Vi søger en ung skuespillere eller en kamaremand til en kortfilm, der skal optages i Vejle.

Roller vi søger: en Ung kvinde – alder 18–21 år. Vi ser gerne, at du har lidt skuespilerfaring, men det vigtigste er, at du har lyst til at være med i et kreativt filmprojekt. 

Optagelser: Vejle📍 Dato📅 oplyses ved henvendelse så vi kan planlægge det sammen:)

Praktisk info: Projektet er ulønnet, men der vil være mad og snacks på settet, og du får en fed oplevelse med filmproduktion samt mulighed for at udvide dit netværk. 

Interesseret Send en besked med:• Navn• Alder• Et billede af dig selv• Eventuel skuespilerfaringVi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎥

items.text:
Casting Actors Paid Commercial Non-Union - Chromie Health

Chromie Health is casting actors for a short comedic commercial promoting Chromie Health, a healthcare staffing platform.

Shoot Date: Tuesday, April 7 (tomorrow) @ 12pm-6pm 

Location: Burbank / North Hollywood, CA

Union Status: Non-Union

Roles

Sarah – Charge Nurse (Principal)

Female, 20–60. Confident, experienced hospital charge nurse explaining the realities of last-minute staffing shortages to the hospital CFO. Strong natural delivery with light comedic timing.

Hospital Staff – Background (5 roles)

All genders, 20–65. Portraying hospital staff such as nurses or administrators in a nurse station / hospital office setting.

Rate

• Principal roles: $150/day

• Background: $100/day

• Meals provided, credit

Usage

Digital commercial / online marketing.

To Submit

Please email: castingchromie@gmail.com

Include:

• Headshot

• Résumé

• Reel (if available)

Subject Line:

ROLE – ACTOR NAME

Example:

Sarah – Jane Smith

If you have any questions, please reach out. Thank you!

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧
items.title: Philip Gill 2024 Showreel SM

items.summary:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM - (This Is My) Family.  (KENT)
**Kent-based actors especially encouraged to apply**

Looking for 1 actor for a **SUPPORTING **role

**ROLE: **

[Lucy] – [20s-30s] (Female) 
* Appears from midpoint to end of film
* Continuous on-screen presence (due to the one static shot for entire films duration)
* Minimal dialogue
* Performance-driven (subtle expression + screen presence)
* Strong showreel potential (long, uninterrupted takes)

Lucy is a meek woman and very much lost in the noise of her husband and the rest of her extended family. You might even forget she’s there. Her husband (Phil) has her around as she has no bite back and looks pretty. She believes she’s loved by her husband and is blind to the fact that he treats her as nothing more than eye candy.

**PROJECT DETAILS: **
* Halstead village, Kent 
* April 11th–14th 

**SCHEDULE: **
*  Day 1: 2:00 PM – 9:00 PM
* Day 2: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
* Day 3: 6:30 PM – 11:00 PM
* Day 4: 6:30 PM – 11:00 PM

* **Unpaid (student film)**
* **Travel + food covered**

**LOCATION NOTE:** 

Preference for actors based in/near Kent or South East London (late shoot times)

**ABOUT THE FILM:** 

A stylised short told entirely in a single static shot. 

A dysfunctional family is forced together for a family event that ends in expected catastrophe. Clare (the overbearing wife), Shaun (the weak husband), Elizabeth (the narcissistic mother) and Marie (the rebellious daughter) will all try to make it through this painful occasion but there's only so much they can all take. 

**IDEAL FOR: **

Actors comfortable holding the frame with minimal dialogue in a long-take, observational style

**TO APPLY: **

Send headshot + reel (if available) to: **tylerbrownework@gmail.com**

topComments.text: which university as student film unpaid should not be a thing for a lot of universities after they signed the Equity agreement for non student actors to be paid nmw for work on student productions (not all universites signed it but most of the big performance running ones did) but surely 20-30s should be a role easily cast with a student actor from the university

Alex

items.text:
Hi Everyone, 

I am Apple Rozas-Lipman, a London-based actor with professional experience. Happy to get involved with film, theatre, TV and commercial projects.

I'm usually cast as someone sensitive, awkward, sincere and intense.

items.text:
CBE Records are looking for an actor for an upcoming UK rap music video shoot in Central London.

Ideally looking for a young male (18–30), particularly Black talent, to play a masked character (ski mask + tracksuit – wardrobe provided), featuring in key scenes with light performance and on-camera presence.

The visual concept explores a contrast between a corporate/political setting and street culture, so we’re looking for someone who can bring strong energy and a confident presence on camera.

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot date: 07/04
🕒 Time: 3PM
⏱ Duration: Approx. 1–2 hours

This is a paid opportunity. The video will be distributed primarily on TikTok.

If interested, please email: [info@cbexldn.com](mailto:info@cbexldn.com) with a short introduction and any relevant photos/content.

—
CBE Records

items.text:
NCL Dancer Audition in LA
Dancer Auditions in LA on April 23rd for Norwegian Cruise Line

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

The Six Compound

4061 Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Bezzant

Seeking dancers for two original mainstage productions onboard Norwegian Cruise Line’s newest vessel, the Norwegian LUNA. *ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John* is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second production, *HIKO*, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary dance and movement.

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

Onboard: $1,000/week ($4,350/month) 

No cruise staff duties. Single cabins.

**Shoot Dates:** April 12 & 15, 2026 (role dependent)

**Location:** Vancouver, BC

**SELF-TAPES DUE BY: APRIL 5, 2026 (11:59 PM)**

Communication via email only. NO DMS.

See attached PDF for rates, role descriptions, and self-tape instructions.

**EDIT: **Folks have reported issues accessing the PDF. The same info is now also available here: [[https://tinyurl.com/NoraveraCastingCall](https://tinyurl.com/NoraveraCastingCall)](https://tinyurl.com/NoraveraCastingCall)

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA i okolice**

**Plan zdjęciowy w JESTED,** **CZECHY**

**Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.**

**14-15 kwietnia**

Do biograficznego filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych, szukam Statystów jako:

 **- TECHNICY / WOJSKOWI  - wiek ok. 20-50 lat – na 14 i 15 kwietnia** (może być 1 dzień lub 2)

**- BARMAN **– góralska knajpa, **ok. 30-50 lat**, na **15 kwietnia**

**- KELNERKA **– góralska knajpa, **dziewczyna ok. 20-35 lat – na 15 kwietnia**

Przed zdjęciami, prawdopodobnie 13 kwietnia – strzyżenie panów jeśli będzie taka potrzeba. 

**Stawka: 140 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + jednorazowo 50 zł dodatkowo za charakteryzację czyli strzyżenie (dotyczy tylko panów)**

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI: **

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką, wygolone boki i kark, wycięte wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko. Tutaj wyjątkiem na pewno może być Barman :)

**KOBIETY:**

- WŁOSY – preferowana długość do ramion lub dłuższe ,mogą być farbowane na jeden kolor, mogą być z odrostami. Wykluczone są pasemka, balejage, ombre, sombre itp.

- PAZNOKCIE - preferowane naturalne krótkie lub opiłowane w kształt migdała, mogą być pomalowane na czerwono lub zbliżone kolorem oraz naturalne. Nieakceptowane są długie paznokcie 

opiłowane w szpic lub kwadrat, zdobione, kolorowe lub french.

- TWARZ - najlepiej naturalna, bez widocznych zabiegów medycyny estetycznej, bez sztucznych, doczepianych rzęs, bez permanentnego makijażu

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JCZ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu (panowie) + aktualne ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SITCOM PILOT (PROOF OF CONCEPT)

We are casting lead and supporting speaking roles for The Rake, a sitcom pilot being developed by BA Filmmaking students at UWE Bristol.

The project will involve filming one key scene as a proof of concept in Bristol on either 27th or 28th April 2026 (1-day shoot). This is a student production, unpaid, with travel expenses and food provided. The scene will form part of a proof of concept for a sitcom in development, to be used for portfolio purposes, festival submission, and as part of a press kit for pitching the project to production companies.

STORY: The Rake is a character-driven comedy set in a once-popular live music venue now struggling to stay afloat, following a music-obsessed supervisor trying to restore it to its former glory, as a new manager pushes it in a completely different direction.

ROLES:

OMAR: Male, 20s, Arab
A music-obsessed supervisor trying to save a failing venue, torn between passion and business.

AISHA: Female, 20s, Arab
Works at The Rake—no one really knows what she does. Omar’s best friend. Chaotic, sarcastic, and secretly invested in the venue.

SEBASTIAN: Male, early 20s, White
Thinks he runs the bar. Loud, arrogant, and desperate for Omar’s approval. Takes Harper on as his “protégé.”

HARPER: Female, 18+, Any ethnicity
New to The Rake. Quiet and nervous at first, but with a sharper edge underneath. Trying to make a good impression while dealing with Sebastian’s ego.

KEY INFO:
Location: Bristol
Shoot date: 27th or 28th April 2026 (1 day)
Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)
Seeking Bristol-based actors

TO APPLY: Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to: therakeseries@gmail.com

items.text:
Headshots that read instantly on Spotlight thumbnails.

Expression-led acting headshots, where I guide you throughout the shoot to create casting-ready images that feel clear, believable, and distinct.

Shoot in my Grantham studio or at your home - relaxed, guided, and creative.

Actors I’ve worked with have later told me things like:

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Method Acting «Die sieben grossen Emotionen»

Letzte Plätze!!!

Du willst:
* die sieben global verbreiteten Emotionen Glück, Trauer, Wut, Angst, Überraschung, Ekel und Verachtung erarbeiten
* die sieben grossen Emotionen in unterschiedlichen Übungen, Improvisationen, Monologen und Szenen ausprobieren und anwenden
* diese Emotionen zuverlässig abrufen, halten, in der Intensität und Dauer variieren und auch wieder aus ihnen aussteigen können
* die Fähigkeit erlernen, in Zukunft alle gewünschten Emotionen schauspielerisch zu entwickeln
* die neuesten Erkenntnissen der Emotionen-Forschung integrieren
* Von mehr als 40 Jahren Erfahrung profitieren

Dann ist dieser Kurs genau das richtige für DICH!

Und das sagen Teilnehmer*innen:

„Für mich stellt der Schauspiel Unterricht auch ein sehr guter Ausgleich zu meinem Büro-Dasein dar und es macht mir viel Spass während des kreativen Prozesses neue Seiten an mir zu entdecken und mich selber und andere (fiktive) Personen besser kennenzulernen. Liebe Grüsse und grosses Lob an dich; ich bin immer wieder begeistert darüber, wie du uns in verschiedene Situationen und Emotionen „hineinreden“ kannst.“ M.

„Vielen Dank für die tollen Kursabende, ich konnte viel lernen und ausprobieren!“ S.

„Du machst es super mit uns allen und die entstehende energy tut mir sehr gut.“ M-R.

„Danke vielmals für Deine Infos und die Lektüre. Es war für mich eine lehrreiche und intensive Zeit. Ich habe Dir gerne zugehört, da Du die Inhalte klar, strukturiert und interessant auf Augenhöhe vermittelt hast. Auch hat mir das Zusammenspiel oder Wirken mit den anderen Teilnehmern gefallen, sei es in den Vorbereitungen oder in den Szenen. Auch einen Einblick hinter die Kulissen zu bekommen, fand ich sehr spannend.“ N.

„Ich werde es nicht los, mich wenigstens schriftlich nochmals bei Dir zu melden und von Herzen für Deine Worte und Dein Verständnis zu bedanken.

Als ich gestern um 18:30 in den Kurs kam, war ich am Anschlag, ohne Energie und völlig ausgelaugt und als ich um … den Zug nach … nahm, spürte ich in mir wieder ein bisschen Leben und positive Energie. Und das war nicht das erste Mal. Bis jetzt war es nach jedem Kurs so. Einfach um Dir zu sagen, dass dein Kurs mir sehr viel bedeutet und auch sehr viel gibt. Ich habe jetzt schon unglaublich viel gelernt, insbesondere auch über mich.“ M.

„Deine Hilfe ist unverzichtbar damit ich … mein Talent in Zukunft als Schauspieler unter Beweis stellen kann!“ P.

„Your training helped, Marco. A teammate told me it was „like real method acting“. I told them I took method acting. They didn’t know that when hiring me.“ A.

(Die Testimonials sind aus Datenschutzgründen anonymisiert. Du willst noch mehr Testimonials? Dann lese auf der Website und auf Google weiter.)

Du willst es genau wissen. Auf der Website findest du alles, was du brauchst:
* Alle Details zum Kurs
* Testimonials / Bewertungen
* Die Anmeldung

ZES Zentrum für Entwicklung im Schauspiel, das Kompetenzzentrum für Gefühle, Emotionen, Stimmungen und Atmosphären

https://zes-info.ch/die-7-grossen-emotionen/

items.text:
Hi everyone! We are looking for extras for our
unpaid student film, Better Man.
We’re filming scenes set in a café, a bar, a concert, and a pub. We are looking for people who’d be up for helping bring those environments to life on screen.
This is an unpaid student project, but it’s a great chance to get involved in a film production, gain some on-set experience, and support an independent project.
If you’re interested and would like more information, please message us directly. Thanks so much!

items.text:
The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

Gloria Instagram link below: 

https://www.instagram.com/thegloriamovie?igsh=dm5rYTVvZ3B6ZjBi

Amazon (Buy/Rent):

https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GL251YNY/

Amazon DVD:

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GNW4X3X2/ref=atv_dp_oth_format_dvd_0

items.text: Join NANI in LA on April 9 & 18!

sharedPost.text:
Since April is my birthday month, celebrate with NANI and me by coming to these screenings in Los Angeles!! Yes!!!

1.NANI 
At the Pasadena Film festival
April 9, 1:30 pm, 
Noho 7 Laemmle Theatre    

 2. NANI 
At the Hollywood Blvd Film Festival 
April 18, 2:15, Let Live Cinema
(This may be NANI’s last day of her global festival run)

items.text:
Casting Actors Paid Commercial Non-Union - Chromie Health

Chromie Health is casting actors for a short comedic commercial promoting Chromie Health, a healthcare staffing platform.

Shoot Date: Tuesday, April 7 @ 12pm-6pm 

Location: Burbank / North Hollywood, CA

Union Status: Non-Union

Roles

Sarah – Charge Nurse (Principal)

Female, 20–60. Confident, experienced hospital charge nurse explaining the realities of last-minute staffing shortages to the hospital CFO. Strong natural delivery with light comedic timing.

Hospital Staff – Background (5 roles)

All genders, 20–65. Portraying hospital staff such as nurses or administrators in a nurse station / hospital office setting.

Rate

• Principal roles: $150/day

• Background: $100/day

• Meals provided, credit

Usage

Digital commercial / online marketing.

To Submit

Please email: castingchromie@gmail.com

Include:

• Headshot

• Résumé

• Reel (if available)

Subject Line:

ROLE – ACTOR NAME

Example:

Sarah – Jane Smith

If you have any questions, please reach out. Thank you!
