items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SITCOM PILOT (PROOF OF CONCEPT)

We are casting lead and supporting speaking roles for The Rake, a sitcom pilot being developed by BA Filmmaking students at UWE Bristol.

The project will involve filming one key scene as a proof of concept in Bristol on either 27th or 28th April 2026 (1-day shoot). This is a student production, unpaid, with travel expenses and food provided. The scene will form part of a proof of concept for a sitcom in development, to be used for portfolio purposes, festival submission, and as part of a press kit for pitching the project to production companies.

STORY: The Rake is a character-driven comedy set in a once-popular live music venue now struggling to stay afloat, following a music-obsessed supervisor trying to restore it to its former glory, as a new manager pushes it in a completely different direction.

ROLES:

OMAR: Male, 20s, Arab
A music-obsessed supervisor trying to save a failing venue, torn between passion and business.

AISHA: Female, 20s, Arab
Works at The Rake—no one really knows what she does. Omar’s best friend. Chaotic, sarcastic, and secretly invested in the venue.

SEBASTIAN: Male, early 20s, White
Thinks he runs the bar. Loud, arrogant, and desperate for Omar’s approval. Takes Harper on as his “protégé.”

HARPER: Female, 18+, Any ethnicity
New to The Rake. Quiet and nervous at first, but with a sharper edge underneath. Trying to make a good impression while dealing with Sebastian’s ego.

KEY INFO:
Location: Bristol
Shoot date: 27th or 28th April 2026 (1 day)
Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)
Seeking Bristol-based actors

TO APPLY: Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to: therakeseries@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – UK DRAMA SERIES (LONDON) - MAY 2026**

We’re casting for a gritty London-based drama series shooting in May 2026.  Looking for strong, natural actors for a range of roles including:

* Lead roles
* Supporting roles
* Featured speaking parts
* Main supporting roles (urgent)

This is a character-driven drama with a raw, grounded tone — focused on real people under pressure.

* North-West London based shoot

To apply:

Send your headshot, CV & showreel (if available)

Include your name, age, location & availability

 [darkzonefilms@gmail.com](mailto:darkzonefilms@gmail.com)

Serious applicants only.

— Dark Zone Films

items.text:
Hi mamas in the US🤍

I’m working on a paid video project about real motherhood and would love to connect with moms who have been** in therapy or are currently in therapy**. 

**(Deadline to submit April 6th)**

Whether it’s for postpartum, anxiety, burnout, relationships, or just having a space to talk—your experience matters.

*This is for an upcoming project sponsored by** BetterHelp**, focused on sharing honest, real stories of motherhood and healing.

Looking for expecting moms and moms in all stages who feel open to sharing their story on camera.

Travel is covered + paid shoot (mid-April, dates may shift).

If this sounds like you, comment below or apply here-
items.title: airtable.com

items.text:
Short Film Casting Call!
Hey, all! Four Horsemen & Co and Stage Zed Entertainment are producing a new short film in the Metro Detroit area that’ll be shooting at the end of April.

We are casting for four roles! Please see the casting flyer for information. Metro Detroit-based is preferred. Let us know if you have any questions!

items.text:
ATTENTION ALL ACTORS! Casting is now open for our upcoming film “MEI.” (@meifilm2026 on Instagram)

Logline: Hollywood’s first Asian Movie star struggles to break away from the expectations of the industry and her family.

Location: Los Angeles, CA
Date (TBD): Late May-Early June 4-5 days.
Compensation: Copy, Meal, Credit, Pay TBD

Be part of Anna May Wong’s story by applying through the QR code. Selected applicants will be contacted via email with callback information. We look forward to seeing your submissions!

DEADLINE: April 30th at 11:59 PM

#castingcall #film #filmmaking #shortfilm #annamaywong

items.text:
Spürst du das Kribbeln? Genau das ist dein Moment.  

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 steht in den Startlöchern und schon jetzt zeigt sich: Diese Staffel wird größer, wilder und spannender als je zuvor! 🚀  

Denn viele starke Talente haben sich bereits beworben… und trotzdem fehlt noch DU!  

💥 Stell dir vor:  
Licht an. Musik startet. Das Publikum schaut nur auf dich.  

Und du zeigst endlich, was in dir steckt.  

🎤 Ganz egal, was dein Talent ist:  
Ob du singst, tanzt, performst, Menschen zum Lachen bringst oder etwas komplett Einzigartiges kannst diese Bühne gehört dir!  

🌟 Was dich erwartet:  
• Eine echte Bühne mit Live-Publikum  
• Gänsehaut-Momente & pure Emotion  
• Eine Show voller Energie und Überraschungen  
• Die Chance, entdeckt zu werden  

⚡ Und das Beste:  
Schon jetzt ist klar – die Konkurrenz ist stark, die Acts sind vielfältig und das Niveau steigt.  

👉 Es wird ein Wettbewerb, den man nicht verpassen darf!  

🚀 Jetzt liegt es an dir:  
Willst du nur zuschauen… oder selbst auf der Bühne stehen?  

📅 Jury Castings: Mai, Juni & Juli 2026  

📝 Bewirb dich jetzt:  
👉 https://electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html  

🔥 Trau dich. Zeig dein Talent. Verändere deinen Moment.  

#evctalentcastingshow #casting2026 #jetztbewerben #talentshow #kleve #showtime #traudich

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 jetzt bewerben für die neue Staffel Wir sucheń Musiker, Tänzer, Artisten, Comedians oder begeistere uns mit mit deinem oder eurem Talent!'

items.text:
Looking for Table Reading Actors
Hello,

I am looking for table reading actors. 

I need
1. Two 30s females,
2. A 30s male,
3. Three 5-7-year-old kids (it doesn't have to be real 5-7 years old kid. I will be very happy if your voice acts like a kid)
4. A 20s female

I cannot pay you, but if you are interested, please message me! Once I set up, I will send my script.

topComments.text: All casts are closed. Thanks a lot, to everyone!

items.text:
Title: Credit Union

Roles:

**Real Families with kids aged 6-14 (all ethnicities)**

**Real Couple ages 25-45 (all ethnicities)**

Production Type: TV Commercial

Compensation: $500 shoot, $1500 buyout 

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Email submissions due no later than Friday 4/10

Callback Date: 4/20 (virtual via zoom)

Shooting Schedule: 4/29-5/1 (talent will work 1 or more days)

Filming Location: Denver, CO

Contact Information: **casting@stonecasting.tv** - to submit email us with the role name in the subject line and a recent photo of your family/you and your partner.

items.text:
Emily Stephens is doing a virtual table read for my feature film script "Judy OR The Tale of the Bitch's Chair" on Sunday, April 12th from 2-5pm and she is in need of actors to read the roles. She will be seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future.

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately.

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis.

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: April 12th 2-5pm
WHO: Emily Stephens

PROJECT: Judy or The Tale of the Bitch’s Chair (95 pages)

GENRE: Dark Comedy/Family Dramedy

SUMMARY: After her brother’s sudden death, a people-pleasing woman inherits the care of her impossible, manipulative mother—and must decide whether enduring her abuse is an act of love or a life she’s willing to abandon.

Narration

~~Judy - 70s, woman (ALREADY CAST) a narcissistic force of a woman who constantly controls, manipulates, and derails every person and situation she’s around.~~ 

Gabby - late 30s, woman, (trans actors encouraged to submit) - Judy’s daughter: a trans woman who can’t stop people pleasing even after she watches how it destroys her brother

Dave - 40s, man (ALREADY CAST) Judy’s son: an every man who is torn between his obligation to his mother and his family who are frustrated with his constant capitulation 

Alex - late 30s, non-binary, (Enbies encouraged to submit) - Gabby’s partner: A deeply practical and steady person who find themselves thrown off in the constant barrage of Judy’s presence and Gabby’s acquiescence

~~Lily - 30s, woman (ALREADY CAST) Dave’s partner: Feisty, disciplined and endlessly frustrated by Dave giving in to Judy. ~~

Madison - 15, girl - Dave and Lily’s daughter: wry, observational, and completely obsessed with her Aunt Gabby. She sees more than people think.

Loles - 60s, woman - A sensual, expressive, joyful Latina who is the closest thing Judy has to a friend

Madison and Loles are both smaller parts that will carry a number of other unnamed parts in the script.

SUBMIT TO: [emily.g.stephens@proton.me](mailto:emily.g.stephens@proton.me) with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read.

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read.**

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

topComments.text: To clarify: this is not my script. This is Emily’s script. I cannot edit the post so just clarifying.

Kostenlose 4-teilige Videoserie!
Erfahre in nur 78 Minuten, wie du erfolgreicher Schauspieler oder Darsteller wirst.

✅ Einstieg nebenberuflich möglich
